items.title: Cathie Wood, Senator Markwayne Mullin Align On These 7 Stock Picks – Some Might Surprise You
items.description: Senator Markwayne Mullin has seven stocks in his investment portfolio in common with the stock picks of Cathie Wood's Ark Invest.

items.title: Elon Musk's xAI wins permit to build power plant in Mississippi despite pollution concerns
items.description: Mississippi regulators authorized xAI to build a power plant with 41 natural gas-burning turbines in Southaven to power its nearby data centers.

items.title: Oppenheimer Raises PT on Caterpillar Inc. (CAT) to $817 From $729 – Here’s Why

(NYSE:CAT) to $817 from $729 on March 6, maintaining an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm told investors that although the stock’s valuation has derived some relief from the […]

items.title: Atlas Energy Solutions Enters Agreement with Caterpillar Inc. to Secure Power Generation Assets Through 2029 to Support Private Grid Development Pipeline
items.description: AUSTIN, Texas, March 10, 2026--Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. (NYSE: AESI) ("Atlas" or the "Company") today announced the execution of a Global Framework Agreement (the "GFA") with Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) ("CAT") covering approximately 1.4 gigawatts of incremental power generation assets, with orders scheduled for 2027 through 2029. With the successful deployment of these assets, Atlas forecasts to own and operate approximately 2.0 gigawatts of power generation assets by 2030.

items.title: Caterpillar Shares Close Higher After Key Trading Signal
items.description: A key trading signal flashed for Caterpillar shares at a price of $667.90, after which CAT rose over 6% to an intraday high.
